mapper.select: SELECT ID, VESSEL_NAME FROM VESSEL_VOYAGE WHERE PHASE = 'D'

SELECT ID, VOYAGE_ID, BEGIN_BOLLARD, END_BOLLARD, GUNWALE FROM T_VESSEL_VOYAGE_SUPPLEMENT WHERE VOYAGE_ID IN
#{voyageId}

SELECT BOLLARD_CODE, BOLLARD_NAME, LON, LAT FROM M_BERTH_BOLLARD WHERE BOLLARD_CODE IN
#{bollardCode}

SELECT t1."id" "id", t1."stackCode" "stackCode", t1."storageCode" "storageCode", t1."stackName" "stackName", t1."workAreaCd" "workAreaCd", t2."id" "id1", t2."stackCode" "stackCode2", t2."storageName" "storageName", t2."storageTypeCode" "storageTypeCode", t2."storageTypeName" "storageTypeName", t3."position" "position", t4.CARGO_COLOR "cargoColor", t3."createByName" "createByName", t3."positionTime" "positionTime", t3."sideLength", t3."area", TEMP."cargoInfos" FROM ( SELECT ID "id", ID "stackCode", PARENT_ID "storageCode", STORAGE_YARD_NM "stackName", WORK_AREA_CD "workAreaCd" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD WHERE STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3' ) t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT A . ID "id", A . ID AS "stackCode", A .STORAGE_YARD_NM AS "storageName", A .STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD AS "storageTypeCode", b.DICT_VALUE AS "storageTypeName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD A INNER JOIN m_dict_data b ON A .STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD = b.DICT_VALUE AND b.DICT_TYPE = 'STORAGE_YARD_TYPE' WHERE A .STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' ) t2 ON t1."storageCode" = t2."stackCode" INNER JOIN ( SELECT Tt2.STACK_ID "stackId", Tt2.POSITION "position", Tt3.USER_NAME "createByName", Tt2.POSITION_TIME "positionTime", Tt2.SIDE_LENGTH "sideLength", Tt2.AREA "area" FROM ( SELECT STACK_ID STACK_ID, MAX (POSITION_TIME) POSITION_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION WHERE DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY STACK_ID ) Tt1 LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION Tt2 ON Tt1.STACK_ID = Tt2.STACK_ID AND Tt1.POSITION_TIME = Tt2.POSITION_TIME LEFT JOIN SYS_USER Tt3 ON Tt2.CREATE_BY = Tt3.ID ) t3 ON t1."id" = t3."stackId" LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TEMP2.MASS_ID, MC.CARGO_COLOR FROM ( SELECT TEMP.MASS_ID, MAX(TEMP.CARGO_CODE) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY TEMP.TON) CARGO_CODE, MAX(TEMP.TON) FROM ( SELECT TPPSD.MASS_ID, TBCI.CARGO_CODE, SUM(TPPSD.TON) TON FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBCI.IS_CLEAR = '0' AND TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID WHERE TPPSD.CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = '0' GROUP BY TPPSD.MASS_ID, TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID, TBCI.CARGO_CODE ) TEMP GROUP BY MASS_ID ) TEMP2 JOIN M_CARGO MC ON MC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND TEMP2.CARGO_CODE = MC.CARGO_CODE ) t4 ON t1."id" = t4.MASS_ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.MASS_ID, TO_CHAR(REGEXP_REPLACE( RTRIM( XMLCAST(XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT(E, TEMP."cargoInfo" || ',') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(TEMP."cargoInfo")) AS CLOB), ',' ), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' )) "cargoInfos" FROM (SELECT TEMP.MASS_ID, REGEXP_REPLACE( RTRIM( XMLCAST( XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT( E, TEMP.CARGO_INFO_NO || '，' || TEMP."shipNameVoyage" || '_' || TEMP.SCN || '，' || TEMP.CARGO_OWNER_NAME || '，' || TEMP.CARGO_NAME || '，' || "portStorageTon" || ',' ) ORDER BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_NO, TEMP."shipNameVoyage", TEMP.SCN, TEMP.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TEMP.CARGO_NAME, TEMP."portStorageTon" ) AS CLOB ), ',' ), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) "cargoInfo" FROM (SELECT TPPSD.MASS_ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, CASE WHEN TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN TBCI.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TBCI.VOYAGE END "shipNameVoyage", TBCI.SCN, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, SUM(TPPSD.TON) "portStorageTon" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON (TBCI.IS_CLEAR = '0' AND TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID) WHERE TPPSD.CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = '0' GROUP BY TPPSD.MASS_ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBCI.SHIP_NAME, TBCI.VOYAGE, TBCI.SCN, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.MASS_ID) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.MASS_ID) TEMP ON t1."id" = TEMP.MASS_ID

SELECT T1. ID "id", T1.STORAGE_YARD_NM "stackName3", T2.STORAGE_YARD_NM "stackName2", T3.STORAGE_YARD_NM "stackName1", TEMP_T4.POSITION "position", TEMP_T5.CAR_COUNT "carCount", TEMP_T6."CARGO_INFOS" "cargoInfos", TEMP_T7.MAC_CODE "macCode" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD T1 LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_YARD T2 ON T2. ID = T1.PARENT_ID AND T2.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_YARD T3 ON T3. ID = T2.PARENT_ID AND T3.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '1' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TT1.STACK_ID, TT2.POSITION, TT2.POSITION_TIME FROM ( SELECT STACK_ID STACK_ID, MAX (POSITION_TIME) POSITION_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION WHERE DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY STACK_ID ) TT1 LEFT JOIN M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION TT2 ON TT1.STACK_ID = TT2.STACK_ID AND TT1.POSITION_TIME = TT2.POSITION_TIME ) TEMP_T4 ON T1. ID = TEMP_T4.STACK_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A .MASS_ID "STACK_ID", COUNT (C.NOTE_ID) "CAR_COUNT" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE A, T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO B, WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND C WHERE A .CARGO_INFO_ID = b.CARGO_INFO_ID AND b.BUSINESS_NO = c.plan_NO AND C.IS_TALLY = '0' AND C.WEIGH_OUT_DT IS NULL GROUP BY A .MASS_ID ) TEMP_T5 ON T1. ID = TEMP_T5.STACK_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TEMP.MASS_ID, TO_CHAR ( REGEXP_REPLACE ( RTRIM ( XMLCAST ( XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT (E, TEMP."cargoInfo" || ',') ORDER BY TO_CHAR (TEMP."cargoInfo") ) AS CLOB ), ',' ), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) ) "CARGO_INFOS" FROM ( SELECT TEMP.MASS_ID, REGEXP_REPLACE ( RTRIM ( XMLCAST ( XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT ( E, TEMP.CARGO_INFO_NO || '，' || TEMP."shipNameVoyage" || '_' || TEMP. SCN || '，' || TEMP.CARGO_OWNER_NAME || '，' || TEMP.CARGO_NAME || '，' || "portStorageTon" || ',' ) ORDER BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_NO, TEMP."shipNameVoyage", TEMP. SCN, TEMP.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TEMP.CARGO_NAME, TEMP."portStorageTon" ) AS CLOB ), ',' ), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) "cargoInfo" FROM ( SELECT TPPSD.MASS_ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, CASE WHEN TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN TBCI.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TBCI.VOYAGE END "shipNameVoyage", TBCI. SCN, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, SUM (TPPSD.TON) "portStorageTon" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON ( TBCI.IS_CLEAR = '0' AND TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI. ID ) WHERE TPPSD.CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = '0' GROUP BY TPPSD.MASS_ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBCI.SHIP_NAME, TBCI.VOYAGE, TBCI. SCN, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME ) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.MASS_ID ) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.MASS_ID ) TEMP_T6 ON T1. ID = TEMP_T6.MASS_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TT1.STACK_ID, TT2.MAC_CODE FROM ( SELECT STACK_ID, MAX (ID) ID FROM T_MAC_WORK_NOW WHERE TO_CHAR(WORK_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = #{workDate} AND CLASS_CODE = #{classCode} GROUP BY STACK_ID ) TT1 LEFT JOIN T_MAC_WORK_NOW TT2 ON TT1. ID = TT2. ID ) TEMP_T7 ON T1. ID = TEMP_T7.STACK_ID WHERE T1.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3' AND TEMP_T4.POSITION IS NOT NULL
SELECT ID, PARENT_ID, STORAGE_YARD_NM FROM M_STORAGE_YARD WHERE STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3'

SELECT a.ID, a.ID AS STORAGE_CODE, a.STORAGE_YARD_NM AS STORAGE_NAME, a.STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD AS STORAGE_TYPE_CODE, b.DICT_VALUE as STORAGE_TYPE_NAME FROM M_STORAGE_YARD a inner join m_dict_data b on a.STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD=b.DICT_VALUE and b.DICT_TYPE='STORAGE_YARD_TYPE' WHERE STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' AND a.id IN
#{storageCode}

SELECT MSY.ID, MSY.PARENT_ID, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_NM, MSY.SHORT_CD, MSY.AREA, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD, MSY.IS_INNER_STORAGE_YARD, MSY.UNIT_AREA_TON, MSY.IS_RENT, MSY.WORK_AREA_CD, MSY.SORT_NUM, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL, MSY.CREATE_BY, MSY.CREATE_BY_NAME, TO_CHAR (MSY.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') CREATE_TIME, MSY.UPDATE_BY, MSY.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TO_CHAR (MSY.UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') UPDATE_TIME, MSY.BHT_ID, TEMP.CARGO_INFO_NO, TEMP."shipNameVoyage", TEMP.SCN, TEMP.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TEMP.CARGO_NAME, TEMP."portStorageTon", TEMP."handoverlistTon", nvl (TEMP.QUANTITY, 0) QUANTITY, nvl (TEMP.TON, 0) TON FROM M_STORAGE_YARD MSY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TPPSD.MASS_ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, CASE WHEN TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN TBCI.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TBCI.VOYAGE END "shipNameVoyage", TBCI.SCN, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, SUM(TPPSD.TON) "portStorageTonOld", temp2."portTon" "portStorageTon", TEMP.TON "handoverlistTon", TPPS.QUANTITY, TPPS.TON FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD join T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE TPPS on TPPSD.PORT_STORAGE_ID = TPPS.ID JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON ( TBCI.IS_CLEAR = '0' AND TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CARGO_INFO_ID, SUM(TON) TON FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST GROUP BY CARGO_INFO_ID ) TEMP ON TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID left join ( select TPPSD3.CARGO_INFO_ID, sum(TON) "portTon" from T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD3 where TPPSD3.CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = '0' group by TPPSD3.CARGO_INFO_ID ) temp2 on temp2.CARGO_INFO_ID = TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TPPSD.CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = '0' GROUP BY TPPSD.MASS_ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBCI.SHIP_NAME, TBCI.VOYAGE, TBCI.SCN, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TPPS.QUANTITY, TPPS.TON, TEMP.TON, temp2."portTon" ) TEMP ON MSY.ID = TEMP.MASS_ID WHERE MSY.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3' AND MSY.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT MSY. ID, MSY.PARENT_ID, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_NM, MSY.SHORT_CD, MSY.AREA, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_TYPE_CD, MSY.IS_INNER_STORAGE_YARD, MSY.UNIT_AREA_TON, MSY.IS_RENT, MSY.WORK_AREA_CD, MSY.SORT_NUM, MSY.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL, MSY.CREATE_BY, MSY.CREATE_BY_NAME, TO_CHAR ( MSY.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) CREATE_TIME, MSY.UPDATE_BY, MSY.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TO_CHAR ( MSY.UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) UPDATE_TIME, MSY.BHT_ID, TEMP.CARGO_INFO_NO, TEMP."shipNameVoyage", TEMP. SCN, TEMP.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TEMP.CARGO_NAME, TEMP."portStorageTon", TEMP."handoverlistTon", TEMP."planNo" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD MSY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TPPSD.MASS_ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, CASE WHEN TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN TBCI.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TBCI.VOYAGE END "shipNameVoyage", TBCI. SCN, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, SUM (TPPSD.TON) "portStorageTon", TEMP.TON "handoverlistTon", BTC.BUSINESS_NO "planNo" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON ( TBCI.IS_CLEAR = '0' AND TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI. ID ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CARGO_INFO_ID, SUM (TON) TON FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST GROUP BY CARGO_INFO_ID ) TEMP ON TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO BTC ON BTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID AND BTC.IS_STOP = '10' LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST BT ON BT.ID = BTC.TRUST_ID WHERE TPPSD.CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = '0' AND (BT.TYPE = '集港' OR BT.TYPE = '疏港' OR BT.TYPE = '陆销') GROUP BY TPPSD.MASS_ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBCI.SHIP_NAME, TBCI.VOYAGE, TBCI. SCN, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TEMP.TON, BTC.BUSINESS_NO ) TEMP ON MSY. ID = TEMP.MASS_ID WHERE MSY.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3' AND MSY.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT MAC_ID, LON, LAT, SPEED, DIRECTION, GPS_TIME, b.MAC_NAME, MMT.MAC_TYPE_CODE, MMT.MAC_TYPE_NAME FROM M_LOCATION a inner join m_machine b on a.MAC_ID=b.ID JOIN M_MACHINE_TYPE MMT ON b.MAC_TYPE_CODE = MMT.MAC_TYPE_CODE
SELECT MAC_ID, LON, LAT, SPEED, DIRECTION, GPS_TIME FROM M_LOCATION_HISTORY WHERE MAC_ID = #{macId} AND GPS_TIME >= #{beginTime} AND GPS_TIME <= #{endTime} ORDER BY GPS_TIME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION(ID, STACK_CODE, STACK_NAME, POSITION, POSITION_FROM, POSITION_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, STACK_ID, DEL_FLAG, AREA, SIDE_LENGTH,FREEHAND_SKETCHING) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{stackCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stackName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{positionFrom, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{positionTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stackId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{delFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{area, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{sideLength, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{freehandSketching, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, PORT_STORAGE_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, INOUT_TYPE, INOUT_STORAGE_CODE, INOUT_STORAGE_NAME, WORK_TICKET_ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, CARGO_TALLY_ID, CARGO_TALLY_DETAIL_ID, INOUT_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CLEAN_MASS_SIGN, CLEAN_MASS_BY, CLEAN_MASS_BY_NAME, CLEAN_MASS_TIME FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE MASS_ID = #{massId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TO_CHAR( TBCI.COMPANY_NAME ) || '/' || TO_CHAR( TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME ) || '/' || TO_CHAR( TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_NAME ) || '/' || TO_CHAR( TBCI.CARGO_NAME ) || '/' || TO_CHAR( TBCI.TRADE_TYPE ) || '/' || TO_CHAR( TBCI.PACKING_NAME ) CARGO_INFO_LABEL FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT ID, BOLLARD_CODE, BOLLARD_NAME, LON, LAT, BERTH_ID FROM M_BERTH_BOLLARD
select * from M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION where STACK_ID = #{statckId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by CREATE_TIME desc
